response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and demonstrated exposure to agentic workflows and event-driven systems, but lacks clear evidence of executive leadership, regulated fintech AI deployment, or scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people — critical for a CTO role in a venture-backed fintech scale-up.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP-like tooling at re:cinq
Proven track record in event-driven, distributed systems (GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture contributions (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source tooling)
concerns: No explicit evidence of leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
Lack of demonstrated experience in regulated fintech domains (credit risk, working capital, compliance)
No clear involvement in model-agnostic AI architecture, real-time inference systems, or LLM evaluation pipelines at scale
